error.access_denied: Access denied: {{path}} is outside allowed directories [{{dirs}}]. Add the directory to tools.allowedDirs in ~/.presence/config.json

config.warn_no_api_key: llm.apiKey is not set — LLM calls will fail

help.commands:
── Conversation ──
/clear        Clear conversation history (memory is kept)

── Info ──
/status       Current status (turn, mode, last result)
/tools        List registered tools
/todos        Show TODO list

── Settings ──
/models       List or switch model (e.g. /models gpt-4)
/memory       Memory management (e.g. /memory list, /memory clear 7d)
/statusline   Configure status bar items (e.g. /statusline +turn)

── Display ──
/panel        Toggle side panel
/report       Save debug report

/quit         Exit

── Shortcuts ──
Ctrl+T  Transcript      Ctrl+O  Tool details
ESC     Cancel turn / Dismiss help

transcript.no_data: No data yet. Run a turn first.
transcript.no_turn_data: No turn data yet. Run a turn first.

memory_cmd.help:
/memory              — summary (node count by tier)
/memory list         — show all nodes
/memory list <tier>  — show nodes in tier (episodic, semantic)
/memory clear        — delete all nodes
/memory clear <age>  — delete older than age (e.g. 7d, 24h, 30m)
/memory clear <tier> — delete all nodes in tier
/memory clear <tier> <age> — combine tier + age filter

models_cmd.not_found: no models found (server may not support /v1/models)

compaction.discarded: History compaction discarded: history was reset during compaction

budget.history_dropped: ⚠ Prompt budget {{pct}}% — {{dropped}} history turns dropped. Use /clear to clean up.
budget.high_usage: ⚠ Prompt budget {{pct}}% — Use /clear or /memory clear to free up context.
